meaning: v.加标点于,不时打断vi.使用标点,加标点
examples: The pupils have not yet learned to punctuate correctly.
You can use asymmetry to punctuate an otherwise orderly, boring design.
Many fjords punctuate its coastline, which is also where most towns are situated.
Scandals captivate our attention as sensational headlines punctuate the mundane din of modern life.
Dropping the voice to punctuate the phrases creates a crisp, clear, and adult cadence.
